name: property managers handling 5–15 lease agreements/month tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 lease agreements/month, missed lease payment deadlines cause late fees and tenant dissatisfaction. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Missed lease payment deadlines leading to late fees and tenant dissatisfaction.
features: Simple dashboard for tracking lease agreements
